purpose: Final exact planned-diff closure; every implementation path must resolve through one machine source below and every behavior-owning slice path must be present in the materialized closure.
field_expression_semantics: For x.*.field, objects without field are skipped and at least one object must provide the field; a nonexistent terminal field across the entire wildcard fails. For non-wildcard access, a missing field fails immediately.

machine_sources.purpose: 44 collectable test rehomes, one delete and one exact non-pytest utility decoupling
behavior and gate paths; declared-new records state only and never grants ownership
TaskService test constructor paths; provider-test projection is applied through provider-test-rehome.v1.json
executable deterministic constructor-owner behavior file paths; selector integrity is validated separately and is not materialized as a path
production constructor and operation-mode callsite path closure

phase-aware exact F151 governance artifacts: current and superseded history paths are pre-T001 S002-owned changed paths; current paths are also final-S104-revalidated, while superseded history never satisfies current authority
base-SHA-bound exact tracked files for every tree/glob deletion; directories and glob placeholders never enter the closure

machine_sources.path_owner_join: same array object by exact path
machine_sources.purpose: exact current and future committed F151 authority/evidence paths with machine owner; generated-local paths are validated by lifecycle templates and never become changed-path exclusions
complete exact active authority documents; semantic scanning is over the whole set, not only changed documents

exact_additional_paths.purpose: remove active Gateway-to-Kernel, Kernel-to-Worker and /kernel/* protocol truth
remove Docker as current isolation fallback while preserving labeled history
current mandatory dependency and backend truth
single Gateway runtime and historical backend projection
remove obsolete example exception while retaining denylist
canonical production entry and retired file loader removal

preexisting_user_baseline.rule: subtract this path only while its exact patch bytes remain identical; any byte drift or any other preexisting/unrelated path fails

retired_term_scan_exceptions.purpose: retired-term scan policy is separate from changed-path closure and never authorizes a changed path
retired_term_scan_exceptions.historical_design_scan_policy: only exact reviewed quotation/competition-history matches may be registered by the retired-term gate; docs/design/** has no changed-path exemption

closure_rules.planned_path_without_slice_owner: fail unless exact_additional_paths declares owner and purpose
closure_rules.source_target_projection: apply namespace and provider-test maps before constructor/scope set comparison
closure_rules.missing_machine_field: fail; every declared field expression must resolve at least one value unless schema marks it optional
closure_rules.machine_path_owner_join: when a machine source declares owner_field, every path object must have exactly one nonempty owner and the joined owner must resolve to a declared slice
closure_rules.f151_self_exclusion: fail; active-artifacts current and superseded history sets must be included in planned closure with exact S002 governance ownership
closure_rules.three_way_closure: materialized planned paths == paths with slice/exact owner == committed+staged+unstaged+untracked changed paths after exact base-bound tree expansion and subtracting only an unchanged preexisting_user_baseline patch
closure_rules.tree_or_glob_delete: fail unless every base tracked file is present in tree-delete-expansion.v1.json with matching Git object id; directory placeholders do not count
closure_rules.generated_local_artifact: walk ignored and unignored feature-root files; validate against artifact-lifecycle.v1.json but never silently remove them from lifecycle closure
closure_rules.other_feature_or_design_change: fail because it is neither planned nor part of the exact preexisting user baseline

negative_fixtures: entries.*.projected_path against runtime-test-constructors.v1.json fails because the field does not exist
a wildcard archive exclusion matching the F151 feature root fails
a change under F149, F150, another feature root or docs/design fails unless listed as an exact F151 planned path
a directory/glob delete with an unexpanded base tracked file fails
a machine field name that does not exist fails rather than returning an empty set
a lifecycle committed path with missing, duplicated or unknown owner fails
an unknown generated-local evidence path fails despite evidence/.gitignore
a current F151 artifact absent from planned closure fails
a superseded review materialized into planned diff without exact S002 governance ownership fails
a planned path without a machine slice owner fails
a changed path not present in materialized planned closure fails
